gallery.name: maggot-pen1
gallery.description: A commercial maggot pen designed for large-scale production, featuring multiple compartments for different stages of maggot development and easy access for harvesting.

gallery.name: maggot-pen2
gallery.description: A modern maggot pen designed for efficient breeding and harvesting of maggots, featuring a controlled environment to optimize growth and minimize odors.

gallery.name: maggot-pen3
gallery.description: A traditional maggot pen that incorporates sustainable materials and advanced ventilation systems to enhance the breeding process.

gallery.name: Adult maggot
gallery.description: A full developed maggot, from a grow out tray, ready for processing.

gallery.name: Grown maggot
gallery.description: Harvesting maggot from a grow out tray.

gallery.name: Maggot Harvesting
gallery.description: Harvesting maggot in a grow out tray.

gallery.name: Maggot substrate
gallery.description: A composed substrate that serves as food for larva. Use cheap substrate such as poultry drops.

gallery.name: Powdered Maggot
gallery.description: A powdered maggot product, fully processed for animal concentrate and feed production.

gallery.name: Modern drying facility
gallery.description: A modern maggot drying facility for industrial and commercial maggot production.

gallery.name: Traditional processing
gallery.description: A local processing facility using economical and low-cost processing techniques.
